title: After the Japanese Derby: Among the Heartening Voices

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text: I... DID IIIT!

text_block_list.name: Caster
text_block_list.text:
Absolutely spectacular! At long last, the Mejiro
family's dream has been realized at the Derby!
Mejiro Ryan displays the pride of her esteemed
lineage!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Wooooo!

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text:
Congratulations, Ryan. Everyone watching was
inspired by your performance.

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text: Sigh... I just couldn't do it. I really wanted to cross that finish line first...

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text: Argh! This sucks! I'm so frustrated right now...

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text: My legs won't even listen to me anymore...

text_block_list.name: Ines's Little Sisters
text_block_list.text: Big Sis! You were incredible!

text_block_list.name: Flashy Part-Timer
text_block_list.text:
That was crazy! She looks totally wiped out! But
still...

text_block_list.name: Flashy Part-Timer
text_block_list.text: Why does she look so freakin' cool?!

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text: I have to... stand up...

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text: ...I have to go!

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text: Trainer...

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text:
Please... Lend me your shoulder. I want to get
closer...

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text:
...There might be a little of this applause that's
for me!

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text:
(This was my dream—charging across the Derby
finish line with the crowd's passionate cheers
behind me.)

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text:
(But I couldn't do it. I gave it everything I had,
but there was still too much I was lacking.)

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text:
(I don't have any strength left in my legs. I feel
pretty pathetic right now, but even so...)

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text:
I want to make a promise... to everyone who
cheered for me.

text_block_list.name: Spectators
text_block_list.text:
WOOOOO!
Congratulations!

text_block_list.name: Spectators
text_block_list.text:
Big Siiis!
You fought hard out there, Ines!

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text:
...Haha. I can hear it. Their voices are reaching
me.

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text: Next time, I'll win for sure. You can count on it.

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text: I'll keep doing whatever it takes!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text: Great race today, Ines.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
Let's compete again at the Kikuka Sho. I know
you won't back down!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
When we get to the waiting room, Ines Fujin
smiles while gently signaling with her hand that
she's okay now.

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text: Did I manage to wave properly at the crowd?

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text: I'm glad to... hear that...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Thud!

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text: Really... glad...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Ines Fujin collapses onto the waiting room floor.
